title: Alok Madan
description: A photography portfolio sequenced as an atmospheric passage through weather, public movement, night color, memory, and hard urban light.
intro: A passage through weather, public current, city systems, and the afterimage of night.
introDesktop: A passage through weather, public current, city systems, and the afterimage of night. The portfolio moves from pale distance into pressure, signal, residue, and color, treating each collection as one room in a longer visual sentence.
introMobile: A passage through weather, public current, city systems, and the afterimage of night.
contactBio: Alok Madan photographs public space as atmosphere in motion: weather, transit, surfaces, bodies at the edge of the frame, and the afterimage left by artificial light. The work is sequenced as quiet narrative rather than isolated destination, attentive to how cities breathe before and after spectacle.
contactRepresented: Available for editorial commissions, travel and city features, brand storytelling, visual research, and long-form photographic sequencing. Select assignments and personal projects are developed from New York with work extending across recurring international routes.
disclaimerText: All photographs, sequences, and written material on this site are presented for portfolio review, editorial inquiry, and commission consideration. Images may not be reproduced, distributed, scraped, or reused without written permission.
